column1: # Dolo SOVEREIGNTY LEDGER — the Python-owned compiler decisions still on the path.
# The sovereignty meter = count(status == python). A slice LOWERS it by flipping one row
# to status=herbert, which requires its wiring oracle to be GREEN (tests/oracle/oracle_wiring.py).
# ORCHESTRATOR-OWNED status column: a worker proposes a flip, the meter+oracle verify it.
# Columns (TAB-separated): id  status  python_site  mirror_candidate  herbert_owner  oracle  description
#   herbert_owner : repo-relative path to the Herbert-family owner once wired (empty while python)
#   oracle        : oracle_wiring.py <id>  (or "(pending)" if not yet authored)
